task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $299.00 and wholesale is $209.00. Product features: Wireless earbuds with CustomTune technology for personalized noise cancellation. Reference: https://www.bose.com/en_us/products/headphones/earbuds/quietcomfort-earbuds-ii.html

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Bose QuietComfort Earbuds II. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
